message:
feat(cli): Improve CLI with better error handling + integration tests

cli/mod.rs:
- Restructure CLI command handling
- Better argument parsing
- Improved error messages with context

cli/conversion.rs:
- Minor conversion refinements

tests/cli_integration.rs (new):
- Comprehensive CLI integration test suite
- Tests encoding, decoding, round-trip conversion
- Validates error cases and edge conditions

beads: Update issue tracker
